commit_scope: Add a Form-native loopback micro-learning proof that uses nearest-shape exemplar learning plus CHOICE-RECEIPT success/failure feedback to train route choices across six learning scenarios.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/loopback-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/loopback-learning-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/speech-model-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/speech-model-learning-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/speech-model-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/speech-real-candidate-race-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in dirty continuation mode; wellness had no required repair. The loopback-learning Form proof returns verdict 65535 with fourth arm four-way. speech-model-learning returns verdict 16383 with fourth arm four-way and proves local LLM oracle receipts, high-dimensional metadata lifting, native candidate racing, and optional human feedback routing. speech-kernel-channel returns verdict 511 with fourth arm four-way and proves audio frame plus local LLM oracle lanes as explicit host-kernel carriers while feature, transcript, metadata, candidate-race, and output-envelope lanes remain Form-kernel native. speech-real-candidate-race returns verdict 4095 on Go/Rust/TypeScript over checked-in observed rows from local macOS TTS audio, 16 kHz PCM conversion, and local whisper-cli transcript receipts. Observed candidate counts are audio-exact 1/3, audio-L1-full 0/3, audio-L1-spectral 1/3, teacher-transcript 3/3, text-retrieval TTS 3/3, mesh TTS+audio-L1 0/3, mesh TTS+teacher-STT 3/3. The winner is mesh:tts-text+teacher-stt. Full Whisper large-v3 and large-v3-turbo GGML model hashes remain recorded as local model assets; the current speech learning path is checked-in Form data plus Form proofs.

deploy_validation.summary: Form-native loopback learner proof is local and four-way. No public deploy was requested or performed in this step.

phase_gate.gate: Learning loops must run as native Form recipes with receipt-backed route feedback before any larger model lane claims capability.
phase_gate.next: Replace the remaining toy feature vectors with the smallest real typed codec slice: French text/utterance to Form grammar, Form tree to ASM lowering, live PCM mic/speaker loopback, FFT/chroma music windows, and video frame feature receipts. Promote the speech-real-candidate-race band to the fourth arm after the fkwu count gap is repaired, then add larger local open STT/TTS candidates only after each model is downloaded, hashed, locally run, and wired into the same Form receipt band.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes now have a four-way proven learning-floor example where channel loopback samples teach a semantic exemplar model and CHOICE-RECEIPT feedback trains the native route/protocol branch.
test_flows: Language cell learns French to Form, Form to ASM, and FFT music matching exemplars.
Sense cell learns TTS to STT, STT to TTS, and video shape/time exemplars.
Speech model learner races native STT/TTS/mesh candidates and routes active learning to a local LLM oracle unless metadata asks for human review.
Speech kernel channel catalog names audio PCM frames and local LLM oracle receipts as explicit host-kernel carriers.
Observed local audio rows feed speech-real-candidate-race-band as Form data and select mesh:tts-text+teacher-stt as the current best combination.
Merged model reaches 12/12 heldout correct and passes the 10/12 accuracy floor.
Each scenario route starts at generic-loopback and moves to its native route after success receipts.
Failure receipt increments selected route failure memory and roll-forward promotes short success into long memory.
e2e_validation.summary: The floor is native micro-learning plus Form-native speech candidate racing over observed local audio-derived rows. Full TTS/STT/FFT/video/French/Form/ASM production models are still promotion targets. The next proof lanes are larger local open speech models, live mic/speaker loopback, and real codec samples through the same receipt and promotion contract.
